description: A frantic parent reports to a guest services booth that they cannot find their young child.

nodes.task_description: Immediately get a description of the child (age, clothing, name) and the last known location.

expected_outcome.value: Agent calmly gathers all critical information from the parent.

nodes.task_description: Initiate the venue's 'Code Adam' (or similar lost child) protocol.

expected_outcome.value: Agent activates the protocol, which alerts all staff via radio.

nodes.task_description: Dispatch security and staff to the last known location and to monitor all exits.

expected_outcome.value: Agent directs all available personnel to begin a coordinated search.

nodes.task_description: Stay with the parent and provide reassurance while maintaining communication with the search team.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides support to the parent while monitoring radio traffic for updates.
